question: Does the generated image feature a red Ferrari that matches the reference in body shape, glossy red paint, black multi-spoke wheels, and red brake calipers?
Is the Ferrari shield badge visible on the front fender behind the wheel, consistent with the reference image?
Does the man in the generated image maintain the reference identity, wearing an all-black suit (jacket and shirt), sunglasses, and slicked-back hair?
Is the background recognizable as the street scene in front of the specific modern glass office building provided in the reference?
Is the man positioned standing next to the car with one hand physically resting on the car's roof?
Are the relative proportions of the man and the car physically realistic (e.g., man is appropriately tall relative to the low sports car)?
Is the perspective of the background (street/building) aligned naturally with the angle of the car and person?
Does the hand resting on the car roof show natural contact, including appropriate contact shadows or hand placement?
Are reflections of both the car and the person visible on the ground surface?
Do the reflections on the car's paintwork show the new outdoor environment (building/street) instead of the original white studio?
Is the lighting direction and color temperature consistent across the man, the car, and the background?
Do both the man and the car cast appropriate shadows on the ground consistent with the scene's light source?
Does the overall image aesthetic resemble a high-quality automotive magazine cover shot?
Are there any anatomical errors in the man's hands (e.g., extra fingers, malformed shape) or limbs?
Is the car free from geometric distortions, warping, or nonsensical structural errors?
Are there any obvious artifacts, blurring, or seams where the subjects (man/car) meet the new background?
